---
applyTo: "assignments/**/README.md"
description: "Use when creating or updating assignment README files under assignments to keep them learning-focused, student-friendly, and consistent with the project template."
---

# Assignment README Standards

When editing assignment README files in the `assignments/` folder:

- Use a clear title that matches the assignment topic.
- Include a `## 🎯 Objective` section with a short explanation of what students will learn or build.
- Include a `## 📝 Tasks` section with one or more task subsections.
- For each task, use `#### Description` and `#### Requirements` headings.
- Keep instructions student-friendly, practical, and easy to follow.
- Match the structure used by other assignment README files in this repository.
